role_in_synthesis: Sprint-002 feasibility records the on-chain NET-01 / DIL-01 intent (block/address/fee observation, known-block replay test) and its PIT-risk framing; defines the required audit, not an authority grant.

NET-01 factor card defines NET-01 requirements and deferred status only (literature-backed network/activity intent; methodology/revision/mapping/availability-time audit required before advancement). It does NOT record bounded observations, coverage/depth results, or raw-body retention.

Establishes SRC-006 ACCEPT REFERENCE_METADATA (NET-01 conditional); SRC-006b CONDITIONAL (publication-time/revision unbounded); SRC-010 CONDITIONAL and not queried; Coin Metrics Community CONDITIONAL — EXPLORATORY_PHASE2.

Retains Coin Metrics observations and documents inventory limitations (per-metric min/max ranges, absence = missing; server-side ranges can expand/revise). The inventory has NO SRC-010 row; it does not record on-chain block-timestamp/indexer-publication differences.

SRC-006 schema: flat timeseries, SplyCur=ISSUED (not float); per-metric min/max ranges can expand/revise (server-side). SRC-010 row: block time vs indexer publication time differ; native; indexer backfills change history. Semantic gaps recorded.

Principle: current metadata is not historical truth; must store retrieval timestamp + source version alongside every object. On-chain (SRC-010) revisions/backfills unbounded and not bounded in this audit; no known-block publication/revision test was executed.

RD-05: Coin Metrics timeseries acquired (SplyCur, AdrActCnt; flat; community flag); Issued != float; NET-01 CONDITIONAL until publication-time vs block-time + revision bounded. RD-07: inputs feasible; does NOT override source conditions or authorize on-chain data.
Records Coin Metrics Community CONDITIONAL — EXPLORATORY_PHASE2; source-specific conditions preserved; no blanket on-chain authority granted.

Reconciles and hash-lists the staged Sprint-003 evidence INCLUDING Coin Metrics response objects. Per REVIEW-0008 (lines 17-20) the staged raw provider datasets were NOT committed to the repo; the reconciliation covers staged objects, not repository-retained raw bodies.

SHA-256 verification of the staged Sprint-003 evidence objects INCLUDING Coin Metrics response objects. Per REVIEW-0008 (lines 17-20) the staged raw provider datasets were NOT committed; verification covers staged objects, not repository-retained raw bodies.
Coin Metrics Community CONDITIONAL — EXPLORATORY_PHASE2; catalog/timeseries reference metadata only; not a primary on-chain observation authority.

AUD-003 final: bounded source-semantics observations; lines 17-20 record that staged raw provider datasets (incl. Coin Metrics response objects) were NOT committed. Does not grant on-chain observation authority or execute the known-block publication/revision test.
DF-01 accepted NO_PRIMARY_PIT_SUPPLY_AUTHORITY; supply-side decision does not itself resolve DF-07 on-chain observation authority.
DF-01 gate results (all blocking) underpinning NO_PRIMARY_PIT_SUPPLY_AUTHORITY; retained as prior accepted evidence. Does not authorize on-chain blocks/addresses/fees observation.
Accepts DF-01 as NO_PRIMARY_PIT_SUPPLY_AUTHORITY; confirms DF-01 does not resolve DF-07.
